CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23566, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,532.50 FILED BY NAVELSKI, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT MOHIUDDIN,NAHEED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVELSKI, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOHIUDDIN,NAHEED $2,532.50 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,547.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
